caption: In a simulated hospital room, three healthcare professionals attend to a medical mannequin lying in a bed. One person, with their back to the camera, wears a black jacket, while another wears blue scrubs, a black face mask, and blue gloves. A third person wears a blue shirt, a black jacket, a black face mask, and blue gloves while holding a white piece of paper. The room is equipped with medical monitors and wall-mounted equipment. Across the frames, the individuals remain in their positions, focused on the mannequin, with slight movements in their postures and hand positions. On-screen text includes a purple circle containing a silhouette and the words "Day 2" on the left, and the phrase "Sim Week" accompanied by a small icon on the right. In the background, a monitor displays the numbers "110" and "13".
